title: iria scaberrima
intro: Iria scaberrima, also known as the Iria plant, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iria scaberrima include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Iria scaberrima is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be applied topically as a salve or poultice to harness its medicinal properties.
